member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Resources.Strings.AppResources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Resources.Strings.AppResources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Resources.Strings.AppResources.AppTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to MeuAppMAUI.

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Resources.Strings.AppResources.ClickBtn
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Click me.

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Resources.Strings.AppResources.WelcomeTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Hello, World!.

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Resources.Strings.AppResources.WelcomeSubtitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Welcome to .NET MAUI.

member.name: T:MeuAppMAUI.Services.LocalizationResourceManager
member.summary: Singleton that exposes localized strings as an indexer so XAML bindings update automatically when the culture is changed at runtime.

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.Services.LocalizationResourceManager.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Indexer — use as {Binding [KeyName], Source={x:Static ...}}.

member.name: M:MeuAppMAUI.Services.LocalizationResourceManager.SetCulture(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Changes the active UI culture and notifies all bound elements to refresh.

member.name: F:MeuAppMAUI.ViewModels.MainViewModel.incrementCounterCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MeuAppMAUI.ViewModels.MainViewModel.IncrementCounterCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:MeuAppMAUI.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
